settings.text: Movement for every body, every level, every intention. Find the practice that fits your life.

settings.title: What We Teach
settings.description: Every class is led by a certified instructor. Mats and props are always provided.

settings.title: Vinyasa Flow
settings.content:
A dynamic, breath-linked practice that builds strength, flexibility, and body awareness through flowing sequences. Each class is different — guided by the teacher's training and the energy in the room. Expect to move, sweat, and leave feeling lighter.

Level: All levels (modifications offered)
Duration: 60 or 75 minutes
What to bring: Water, a towel. Mats provided.

settings.title: Power Flow
settings.content:
A faster-paced, strength-focused vinyasa practice designed to challenge experienced practitioners. Longer holds, arm balances, and inversions woven into a continuous flow. Not for the faint of heart — but deeply rewarding.

Level: Intermediate to advanced
Duration: 60 minutes
What to bring: Water, towel, willingness to be humbled.

settings.title: Restorative Yoga
settings.content:
Long-held, fully supported poses that invite the body and nervous system to release deeply. Bolsters, blankets, and blocks do the work — you just have to let go. The most underrated class on the schedule.

Level: All levels, especially beginners
Duration: 75 minutes
What to bring: Comfortable clothes. Everything else is provided.

settings.title: Yin Yoga
settings.content:
Slow, passive stretching targeting deep connective tissues and fascia. Poses are held for 3–5 minutes in stillness. Meditative, introspective, and deeply restorative for both body and mind.

Level: All levels
Duration: 60 minutes

settings.title: Mat Pilates
settings.content:
Core-focused, full-body conditioning inspired by Joseph Pilates' original mat work. Build stability, alignment, and functional strength through precise, controlled movements. Great cross-training for runners, cyclists, and desk workers.

Level: All levels
Duration: 50 minutes

settings.title: Guided Meditation
settings.content:
A 30-minute seated meditation session, guided by a teacher. Techniques rotate between breath awareness, body scan, loving-kindness, and visualization. No experience needed — just a willingness to sit.

Level: All levels
Duration: 30 minutes

settings.title: Simple, Honest Pricing
settings.description: No contracts. Cancel anytime. Your first class is always free.

settings.name: Drop-In

settings.text: One-on-one sessions tailored to your goals — whether you're recovering from injury, preparing for a challenge, or just want undivided attention. Available with any of our senior instructors.

settings.features:
+ Personalized sequencing
+ Injury-aware modifications
+ 60 or 90 minute sessions
+ In-studio or virtual
